steps.title: Set up the standard form equation
steps.content: The standard form of a circle with center $(h, k)$ and radius $r$ is $$(x - h)^2 + (y - k)^2 = r^2$$ With center $(-4, 4)$ and radius $7$, substitute: $$(x - (-4))^2 + (y - 4)^2 = 7^2$$ $$(x + 4)^2 + (y - 4)^2 = 49$$

steps.title: Rearrange to general form
steps.content: Move the constant $49$ to the left side to match the form $x^2 + y^2 + ax + by + c = 0$: $$x^2 + y^2 + 8x - 8y + 32 - 49 = 0$$ $$x^2 + y^2 + 8x - 8y - 17 = 0$$ Comparing coefficients, $c = -17$.
